series_metadata.series_description: The records (electronic and/or paper) consist of certified payroll reports for the Department of Natural Resources (ODNR) construction projects. These reports are used to confirm that employees are paid wages in compliance with appropriate state and federal prevailing wage rates. The reports consist of names, addresses, social security numbers, compensation data for individual employees, prevailing final wage affidavits, payroll schedules, prevailing wage notifications to employees, benefit statements, correction letters and supporting documents.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Three (3) years completion of project if there is no litigation, administrative proceeding, required audit or required resolution of an audit discrepancy outstanding, ; Paper: Three (3) years completion of project if there is no litigation, administrative proceeding, required audit or required resolution of an audit discrepancy outstanding
